text: 2139 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ كَانَتْ إِذَا قَرَّبَتِ اَلْقُرْبَانَ تَخْرُجُ نَارٌ فَتَأْكُلُ قُرْبَانَ مَنْ قُبِلَ مِنْهُ وَ أَنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى جَعَلَ اَلْإِحْرَامَ مَكَانَ اَلْقُرْبَانِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2139 - It has been narrated: "The Children of Israel, when they offered a sacrifice, a fire would descend and consume the sacrifice of the one whose offering was accepted. Allah (swt), Blessed and Exalted, made the state of Ihram in place of the offering."
